inst.name: MMS_WSStub
inst.short-description: A helper component used to make an event process invokable from a webService (wsgateway) or other event processes.
inst.long-description: A helper component used to make an event process invokable from a webService (wsgateway) or other event processes.

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_checkAccount_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation checkAccount

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_checkAccount_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation checkAccount

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_fundtransfer_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation fundtransfer

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_fundtransfer_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation fundtransfer

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_reversal_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation reversal

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_reversal_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation reversal

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_khqrincoming_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation khqrincoming

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_khqrincoming_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation khqrincoming

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_FTCollection_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation FTCollection

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_FTCollection_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation FTCollection

outputport-instance.name: SOAP11_checkAccount_REQUEST
outputport-instance.description: Request XML for operation checkAccount

outputport-instance.name: SOAP11_fundtransfer_REQUEST
outputport-instance.description: Request XML for operation fundtransfer

outputport-instance.name: SOAP11_reversal_REQUEST
outputport-instance.description: Request XML for operation reversal

outputport-instance.name: SOAP11_khqrincoming_REQUEST
outputport-instance.description: Request XML for operation khqrincoming

outputport-instance.name: SOAP11_FTCollection_REQUEST
outputport-instance.description: Request XML for operation FTCollection

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

inst.name: T24
inst.short-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.
inst.long-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.

resource-properties.resource-property:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/ToGetAccountInfo/Output" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns40="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <checkAccountRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(count($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType))<=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="'124'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUSCODE"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUDESC"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountCcy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTCCY"></xsl:value-of> </AccountCcy> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> <AccountBalanceAvaliable> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTAVLBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalanceAvaliable> <AccountBranchOpen> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTBRANCH"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBranchOpen> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:SHORTTITLE"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <CustomerID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:CUSTOMER"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerID> <Phonenumber> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:PHNO),string(' '),string('g'),string(''))"></xsl:value-of> </Phonenumber> </checkAccountRp> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

inst.name: Epay_res
inst.short-description: The CBR service filters data based on the an XPATH selection criteria.
inst.long-description: The CBR service allows data filtering based on the given XPATH selection criteria. This service accepts XML data on the input channel, performs XPATH selection and writes data to the appropriate output port.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Accepts the incoming messages of XML format

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

outputport-instance.name: request
outputport-instance.description: The port gives out the message which satisfies the specified XPath expression

outputport-instance.name: OUT_FALSE
outputport-instance.description: The port gives out the message which does not satisfy any of the XPath expressions

inst.name: Res_epay
inst.short-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML
inst.long-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

outputport-instance.name: OUT_FALSE
outputport-instance.description: The port gives out the message which does not satisfy any of the XPath expressions

resource-properties.resource-property:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPI" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/CPTWS/WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI/Input" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACRTMB" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/CPTWS" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSWIFTOUTMB" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <assignReason> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </assignReason> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPIType> <ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Channel)=('MOBAPP')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/FTCollectRq/FromAccount),string('1403300010001'),string('g'),string('1403800010001'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <ns7:DEBITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITTHEIRREF> <ns7:CREDITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITTHEIRREF> <ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <ns7:CREDITCURRENCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Currency"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITCURRENCY> <ns7:CREDITAMOUNT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITAMOUNT> <ns7:gPAYMENTDETAILS> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:PAYMENTDETAILS> <xsl:value-of select="'COLLECTION'"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:PAYMENTDETAILS> </ns7:gPAYMENTDETAILS> <ns7:gCOMMISSIONTYPE> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:mCOMMISSIONTYPE> <xsl:attribute name="m"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute></ns7:mCOMMISSIONTYPE> </ns7:gCOMMISSIONTYPE> <ns7:INITBANK> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/TransId"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:INITBANK> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPIType> </ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

inst.name: T24_W
inst.short-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.
inst.long-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.

outputport-instance.name: WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI__OUT_PORT

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

inst.name: Collectres
inst.short-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML
inst.long-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port
